description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface, creating a striped pattern. The grooves are deep and dark, contrasting sharply with the lighter, speckled stone material in between. The block has a solid, robust appearance, with clean, straight edges and a uniform thickness. The sides of the block are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the functional, utilitarian design. The overall look suggests durability and resistance to wear, suitable for high-traffic urban environments. The surface finish appears slightly rough, likely to provide traction and prevent slipping.
description: A rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on top, creating a striped, high-traction surface. The block is solid, robust, and visually suited for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the block and the parallel grooves running horizontally across the top.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the depth and spacing of the grooves, with the grooves running away from the viewer.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the grooves from the opposite side, maintaining the striped pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, again emphasizing the depth and regularity of the grooves.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza drainage cover
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set flush with pavement
attribute_weathering_pattern: No significant weathering visible; surface appears clean and well-maintained with minor speckling.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: set flush and aligned with adjacent pavement or stonework
